intent: Write a 3-source analysis on 'travel packing essentials for a 10-day international trip in one carry-on'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the clothing-shoes-jewelry, health-household, and electronics categories and collect at least 5 products (compression cubes, adapter, toiletries, one clothing item, portable charger). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/AskReddit for posts on one-bag travel, over-packing, or must-have items. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Packing cube' or 'Hand luggage' and one adjacent article ('Carry-on luggage') and extract 3-4 facts about size limits or proven strategies. The report must: (a) propose a carry-on packing list with stats, (b) enforce size rules from Wikipedia, (c) use community wisdom to cut excess, (d) close with a weight-tracking checklist. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Hard 3-site. Travel packing list with rule enforcement.
